note: Source ledger for codexcalculemus.com. Published laws + held-back colophon + cycle log. Specimens are well-known results, genuinely kernel-checked here to show the format until the daemon's discovery frontier publishes novel laws. See scripts/export_calculemus.py to regenerate from a live Calculemus.

laws.statement: Every power of two is positive
laws.falsifiable_claim: a natural n for which 2 ^ n = 0

laws.statement: Every successor of a natural number is positive
Addition of natural numbers is commutative
laws.falsifiable_claim: two naturals a, b with a + b ≠ b + a
laws.theorem_src: theorem add_comm_nat (a b : Nat) : a + b = b + a

held_back.statement: Multiplication of natural numbers is commutative
held_back.reason: promulgated to the Codex; awaiting operator publication

cycles.summary: An illustrative cycle showing the work-log format: six seeds surveyed over the analysis-of-algorithms frontier, candidates quarantined with their reasons, one law promulgated.
